data.title: Beyond The Numbers: 5 Analysts Discuss Penguin Solutions Stock
Fidelity National Unloads Worldpay Stake To Global Payments For $6.6 Billion, Scoops Up Issuer Unit For $12 Billion
data.description: FIS strikes twin deals—offloads Worldpay stake to GPN for $6.6B and acquires Issuer Solutions for $12B in strategic pivot.

data.title: Snap-On's Q1 Results Underwhelm, CEO Stresses Resilience And Strategic Advantage Moving Forward
data.description: Snap-On Inc. (NYSE: SNA) reported weaker Q1 2025 results, missing revenue and earnings estimates. CEO confident in company's strategy and resilience.

data.title: Ford Recalls Nearly 150,000 Vehicles Over Brake And Powertrain Issues:  NHTSA
data.description: Ford recalls 148,000 vehicles in the U.S. due to fluid leak affecting braking performance, and software issues.

data.title: Blackstone Beats Q1 Estimates, AUM Climbs to $1.17 Trillion, Inflows Hit 3-Year High
data.description: Blackstone (BX) reports strong Q1 results, with revenues of $2.763B (+8% Y/Y) and DE of $1.41B (+11% Y/Y). AUM rises to $1.17T, with inflows of $61.6B. BX also declares a dividend and has $9.8B in cash.
